name: Baked Summer Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. Remove and discard the stem ends of the squash.
3. Slice the squash lengthwise, scoop out the seeds, and place the halves side-by-side on a baking sheet.
4. Combine the remaining ingredients in a mixing bowl.
5. Fill the hollows in the squash evenly with the cheese mixture.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the squash is tender.
7. Serve immediately.
